label: base-character
prompt: Priya, a thoughtful, smart 30-year-old South Asian woman, a crypto hobbyist and tech enthusiast. Dark hair, intelligent observant eyes, optional clear glasses, natural skin texture with light makeup. Wearing a plain solid-colour casual top, no logos or graphics. Hyper-realistic photograph with super-detailed true-to-life skin texture: visible pores, fine lines, subtle natural blemishes and freckles, slight uneven skin tone and natural imperfections, not airbrushed and not too perfect. Natural daylight lighting, front-view close-up portrait looking directly at the camera, passport-style, only the close-up portrait.
